name: _DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE
pattern: /^_DEFAULT_FONT_SIZE = 16  # 模块级默认（_init_fonts 后会更新）$/

name: _DIZHI
pattern: /^_DIZHI = "子丑寅卯辰巳午未申酉戌亥"$/

name: _LUNAR_MONTHS
pattern: /^_LUNAR_MONTHS = "正二三四五六七八九十冬腊"$/

name: _MCP_LOOP
pattern: /^_MCP_LOOP = None  # 持久事件循环（后台线程）$/

name: _SHENGXIAO
pattern: /^_SHENGXIAO = "鼠牛虎兔龙蛇马羊猴鸡狗猪"$/

name: _apply_one
pattern: /^def _apply_one(file_path: str, old_code: str, new_code: str, cwd: str, description: str = "") ->/
signature: (file_path: str, old_code: str, new_code: str, cwd: str, description: str = "")

name: _apply_patch
pattern: /^def _apply_patch(file_path: str, patch_content: str, preview: bool, backup: bool):$/
signature: (file_path: str, patch_content: str, preview: bool, backup: bool)

name: _apply_patch_python
pattern: /^def _apply_patch_python(file_path: str, original_content: str, patch_content: str, preview: bool/
signature: (file_path: str, original_content: str, patch_content: str, preview: bool, backup: bool)

name: _check_conflict
pattern: /^def _check_conflict(file_path: str, old_code: str, cwd: str) -> Optional[str]:$/

name: _delete_lines
pattern: /^def _delete_lines(file_path: str, start_line: int, end_line: int, preview: bool, backup: bool):$/
signature: (file_path: str, start_line: int, end_line: int, preview: bool, backup: bool)

name: _execute_step
pattern: /^def _execute_step(plan: dict, step: dict, cwd: str) -> dict:$/

name: _generate_unified_diff
pattern: /^def _generate_unified_diff(old: str, new: str, filename: str = "file", context_lines: int = 3) -/
signature: (old: str, new: str, filename: str = "file", context_lines: int = 3)

name: _insert_lines
pattern: /^def _insert_lines(file_path: str, start_line: int, new_content: str, preview: bool, backup: bool/
signature: (file_path: str, start_line: int, new_content: str, preview: bool, backup: bool)

name: _last_topic
pattern: /^_last_topic = None   # 上次操作的 topic_id, 用于检测主题切换$/

name: _mcp_connect
pattern: /^def _mcp_connect(server_name: str, command: str, args: list, transport: str, url: str):$/
signature: (server_name: str, command: str, args: list, transport: str, url: str)

name: _replace_lines
pattern: /^def _replace_lines(file_path: str, start_line: int, end_line: int, new_content: str, preview: bo/
signature: (file_path: str, start_line: int, end_line: int, new_content: str, preview: bool, backup: bool)

name: _restored
pattern: /^_restored = False    # 是否已从 DB 恢复$/

name: _search_codebase
pattern: /^def _search_codebase(query: str, root_path: str, glob_pattern: str, max_results: int):$/
signature: (query: str, root_path: str, glob_pattern: str, max_results: int)
